reference: Hello, dear. This may be pityriasis rosea. I would like to know if you had a sore throat. It is usually associated with this condition, but it is not necessary. The lesions are usually mildly itchy. It is probably a viral infection. Here are my suggestions for you: Use Desonide lotion once at night for seven days. Take Cetirizine if you have itching. I hope you get better soon. Thank you.
